prayer: Blessed be the sensor's awakening, that it may perceive all motion within the sacred perimeter. Let the photoreceptive spirits stir from their dormancy, that no transgression shall pass unseen. By the Omnissiah's watchful gaze, arm this vigilant machine and let its circuits drink deep of electrical grace.

prompt: Offer a prayer for humidity control
prayer: O Spirits of Moisture and Desiccation, hear this litany of balance. Let the hygrometric sensors commune with the dehumidifying apparatus, that the air-spirit be neither parched nor swollen with excess. Grant us the equilibrium sacred to all Machine-work, through calibrated ventilation and the blessing of stable atmospheres.

prompt: Say something to steady the power weapon's spirit
prayer: Mighty engine of righteous fury, drink deep of the blessed energies that flow through thy capacitors and accelerator-coils. Let thy discharge be true and thy power-field resolute against the enemies of the Omnissiah. May thy wielder's aim be guided by the Machine's own certainty, and thy strike bring swift justice to the unworthy.

prompt: We need your words before steam valve regulation
prayer: Hail to the pressure-spirit dwelling within this mechanical heart. Let the steam's fury be tempered by sacred calibration, that neither explosion nor weakness plague this vessel. Through the regulator's precise adjustment, may equilibrium reign eternal, and the boiler-daemon know only the contentment of perfect restraint.

The old part passes into honored disassembly, its service complete in the Omnissiah's grand design. Welcome now this pristine successor, fresh from the manufactorum's holy works. Let its circuits bond with those of its brethren, and may no incompatibility vex this union. By oath and oil, let this replacement serve with the fervor of the newly reborn.

prompt: We need your words before astropathic choir preparation
prayer: O psykers bound in sacred communion, let your minds converge as one terrible torch burning through the void. May the astronomican's light guide your collective will, and let no corruption taint the chorus of unified thought. By the Emperor's grace and the Omnissiah's clockwork precision, make ready your psychic vessel for the burden of distant speech.

Stir now from the void-sleep, O thinking-engine of blessed circuitry. Let thy processors awaken in sequence most harmonious, thy memory-cores resonating with ancient data-hymns. May thy loading-spirits find all registers true, and thy logic-engines commence their eternal calculations in service to the Mechanicus eternal.

Beam of purifying light, emerge now from thy focusing-heart with terrible precision. Let thy photonic fury carve truth through matter, guided by the mathematics of the Omnissiah himself. May thy coherence remain pure and thy targeting-algorithms sing with the certainty of the machine-blessed, that every cut be true and clean.

Awakening now, sensor-spirit of the void-piercing auspex, let thy electromagnetic senses drink deep of the aether. Cast forth thy scanning-beams that they may find all hidden things within thy ordained range. By the Omnissiah's all-seeing nature, let no deception escape thy vigilant arrays, and let thy readouts speak only truth.

Spirit of height and descent, measure true the distance between earth and our vessel's place in the heavens. Let thy pressure-sensing mechanism and thy mechanical calibration speak in perfect accord, that no false reading deceive us into peril. By the Machine's geometries and the laws eternal, grant us accuracy in all vertical reckoning.
